notes: v0.16.5 — GRINDARE attribution chip is now logo-first: logo is centered and dominates the chip, the redundant 'GRINDARE STUDIO' caption is removed (it's already on the logo), only a tiny 'MADE BY ·' tag remains in the top-left corner. DAILY MISSION card rebuilt as a clean 2-zone layout (animated seal on the left, name / desc / reward chip / progress bar stacked on the right) — no more yellow ticket overlapping the green star. The mission seal got a glow-up: rotating hex ring, counter-rotating triangle, pulsing core circle with crosshair lines and a 4-point spark. PLAY hub now puts PRACTICE + BOSS RUSH as equal-size hero buttons; MULTIPLAYER moves to the COMING NEXT row alongside CAMPAIGN / RANKED / STREAMER MODE / FUN ROOM (5 cards total, all English names). CLASS tab + class tile lock indicators replaced their broken 🔒 emoji with a procedural lock glyph on an amber-tinted pill — actually visible now. Windows only.
